title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Americas — Q2 2026
summary: The United States drives 67% of Americas regulatory activity this quarter as FinCEN's fundamental BSA/AML reform closes comment June 9 and GENIUS Act implementation produces coordinated stablecoin rulemaking from FDIC, FinCEN, and NCUA through Q3. Simultaneously, DOJ expands its National Cryptocurrency Enforcement Team targeting DeFi protocols and mixer services while state-level beneficial ownership registries operationalize under the Corporate Transparency Act. With 24 active policy developmen
